note: Zero-shot tag prompts, one per canonical label in toolkit.image_classification.ROOM_TYPES. The CLIP trial picks argmax cosine(image, prompt) and measures agreement against the existing Haiku image_room_classifications on this exact label space, so 'does CLIP tag as well as the paid classifier' is a single number. Extended house/land buckets are a v2-core follow-up once tagging is proven on this core.

prompts.kitchen: a photo of a kitchen with cabinets and a countertop
prompts.bathroom: a photo of a bathroom with a shower or bathtub
prompts.toilet: a photo of a separate toilet or WC
prompts.living_room: a photo of a living room with a sofa
prompts.bedroom: a photo of a bedroom with a bed
prompts.hallway: a photo of a hallway, corridor or entrance hall
prompts.exterior_facade: a photo of the outside facade of a residential building
prompts.balcony_terrace: a photo taken on a balcony or terrace
prompts.garden: a photo of a garden, yard or outdoor green space
prompts.floor_plan: an architectural floor plan drawing of an apartment layout
prompts.site_plan: a site plan, situation plan or cadastral map drawing
